name: Central Illinois
description_short: ERROR: This is not a financial services company. 'Central Illinois' is a tourism destination website promoting travel and attractions across Illinois regions.
description_long: CRITICAL MISCATEGORIZATION DETECTED. The provided URL (https://www.enjoyillinois.com/places-to-go/land-of-lincoln/) is the official 'Enjoy Illinois' state tourism website, not a consumer finance company. The website content exclusively covers travel planning, attractions, historical sites, and destination guides for Central Illinois regions including Springfield, Bloomington-Normal, Champaign-Urbana, and Decatur. There is no financial product, service, lending capability, or credit-related offering present on this page. The website promotes things to do, places to visit, road trip itineraries, and tourism experiences such as Abraham Lincoln historic sites, Route 66 attractions, Amish country experiences, and regional festivals. No payday loans, alternatives to payday loans, credit unions, CDFIs, employer advances, or any financial services under 36% APR (or any APR) are offered or mentioned. This appears to be a data entry error where a tourism website was incorrectly assigned to the payday-alternatives financial services category. The profile cannot be completed as requested because the subject entity is not a financial services provider.
